creator: mallocbsd@foxmail.com
text:
Comment on attachment 145181
graphviz port build when /proc is mounted

$ grep proc /etc/fstab
linprocfs       /proc   linprocfs   rw 0 0
$ ls /proc/self/maps
/proc/self/maps

$ script /tmp/graphviz.build.log
$ cd /usr/ports/graphics/graphviz
$ sudo make clean install
$ grep GVLIBDIR /tmp/graphviz.build.log
$

No occurrence of GVLIBDIR, but one for LIBDIR( LIBDIR="/usr/lib" )

But eventually, I cannot reproduce it now, after many mount/umount and deinstall/install.
